Richmond's Premier Construction
& Home Renovation Specialist

Get a Free Estimate!

Born to Renovate

//

Following in my family’s footsteps I gained a loved for construction work. I created Clark Construction to not only be able to offer professional services to those who request it, but also offer the work to the community as well. Clark Construction is much more than a regular construction company; we strive to come together as a team and make your dreams come true!

What Our Clients Say

//

Great team. It's been a pleasure hiring them as a subcontractor for projects. They make the process go smooth, and they are highly focused on customer satisfaction.
- Ken Gray
Clark construction has knowledgeable workers that show up on time. They are organized and thorough with their work. They can do everything from drywall to roofs.
- Rex Gillim
They were a pleasure to have in my home. Worked efficiently and stayed in their timeline of completion. Would hire them again.
- Janet Burley
These guys remodel our office space. They did a fantastic job and we were impressed how fast they got the job done
- Spin It Live LLC
CLARK CONSTRUCTION IS A PROFESSIONAL COMPANY. That serves all areas in Kentucky. Reliable, dependable no job to small for the company to complete.
- Suzanna Swann
Get to Know Us Better

Home Remodeling

//

Ready to make your home feel brand new? At Clark Construction LLC, we specialize in home remodeling in Richmond, KY that turns your ideas into reality. Whether you dream of a modern kitchen, a relaxing bathroom retreat, or extra space for your growing family, we’ve got you covered. With years of experience serving Richmond, KY, we focus on quality work, open communication, and solutions that fit your needs and style. Let’s create a home you’ll love even more. Reach out to Clark Construction today for a free consultation, and let’s start your remodel!

Learn More

Roofing

//

Need reliable roofing services in Richmond? At Clark Construction LLC, we specialize in roof repairs, replacements, and installations that you can trust. Whether you’re dealing with leaks, storm damage, or simply need an upgrade, our experienced team is here to provide quality craftsmanship and peace of mind. Serving Richmond, KY, we use only the best materials to ensure your roof is strong, durable, and built to last. Don’t wait until it’s too late—contact Clark Construction today for a free roofing consultation and protect your home with a roof you can count on!

Learn More

Ready to Build Your Vision?

Contact Us!

Flooring

//

Flooring can truly make or break a room. It’s the foundation of your home’s style, and at Clark Construction LLC, we get that! We’re not just about building; we’re about creating spaces you’ll love.
Whether your heart’s set on the classic charm of hardwood, the easy care of laminate, or the sleek look of tile or vinyl, we’ve got options galore. And don’t worry about feeling overwhelmed – our team’s here to walk you through it all. We’ll help you find the perfect flooring fit for your taste and budget.

We handle everything with expert care, from picking the right materials to the final installation. You can trust us to deliver a stunning result that adds warmth, value, and that “wow” factor to your home.

Ready to give your floors a fresh start? Reach out to Clark Construction today, and let’s make your dream floors a reality!

Learn More

Decks and Patios

//

Turn your backyard into a peaceful retreat with a custom deck or patio from Clark Construction in Richmond, KY. We specialize in designing and building beautiful outdoor spaces that are built to last and tailored to fit your style. As a local, licensed, and insured business with years of experience, we take care of everything from the design to handling the permits, making the process easy and stress-free. A custom deck or patio not only boosts your property value but also enhances your outdoor living and overall quality of life. Reach out today for a free consultation!

Learn More
